features.name: virtual method declaration in class
features.description: Code should include a virtual function or virtual task declared within a class definition

features.name: virtual method call via scope resolution operator
features.description: Code should include a virtual method call using scope resolution operator BaseClass::method() from within a derived class that does not override the virtual method

features.name: super scope resolution for base class method
features.description: Code should include a method call using super:: prefix to reference a base class method from a derived class
